series_metadata.series_description: Inter-state Voucher, Daily Travel Expense Report & Voucher, Part Voucher (White Original), Voucher Transmittal (Discount-Green), Contract Services Invoices, Invoices, Billings and Statements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until federal audit or 1 year after close of fiscal year in which paid whichever is later, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
